message:
fix: update stale checksum for community/qualisero-pi-agent-scip + test improvements

Updated SHA256 checksum in 3 catalog files (provenance, inclusion-list,
master-catalog) to match actual artifact on disk. Fixes 2 failing tests
in ext_conformance_artifacts. Also includes auto-repair test refinements.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
